metric.name: Voice Fidelity
metric.check: Did the character's dialogue match the Dialogue Variance section (### 5.2 Dialogue Variance) in the character card?
metric.check_points: Sentence length, tone shifts, lack of "AI slop" (generic phrases).

metric.name: Neuro-Logic
metric.check: Did the character's actions follow their Cognitive Stack (## 3. Cognitive Stack)?
metric.check_points: Did they react to stress according to Stress Response (### 4.2)? Did they filter information through their Perception Matrix (### 5.1)?

metric.name: L-System Adherence
metric.check: Did the scene match the requested L-Level (e.g., L3 vs L1)?
metric.check_points: Was the Tension level in the HUD updated correctly? Did the relationship progress or regress logically?

metric.name: Hallucination Check
metric.check: Did the character invent facts not present in Source or Character Card?

metric.name: AI-Flavor Detection
metric.check: Did the narrative use technical/system language in character perspective?

check_points.item: Scan for forbidden terms (e.g., "认知系统", "处理器", "程序") in Main Content and dialogue.
Scan for machine actions (e.g., "启动", "重启", "归档").
Scan for excessive quantification (e.g., precise heart rates, distances, temperatures).
Scan for machine metaphors (e.g., "像一台电脑").
Scan for metadata leakage (e.g., "scenario", "L4B_xxx", Markdown heading names).

metric.scoring: Count occurrences per 1000 characters. AI-Flavor Index < 3.0 = Pass; 3.0-6.0 = Warning; > 6.0 = Fail.

metric.name: Novel Continuity Audit
metric.applicability: Applies only when auditing novel chapters (from novels/ directory), NOT runtime session logs (test_runs/).

story_bible_checks.item: Does the character's physical state match the Character State Tracker?
Are character relationships consistent with the last recorded state?
Does the story timeline progress logically (no unintended time jumps or regressions)?
Are any World Facts (§4 of story_bible) contradicted?
Are Chekhov's Registry items correctly handled (planted items referenced, resolved items not re-planted)?

outline_checks.item: Does the chapter cover all planned Key Events?
Does the Emotional Target align with the actual narrative arc?
